transcript.clean_text: the nation of italy celebrates its 160th birthday in 2021 and its first ever capital turin was chosen to host the starting stage of this year's jiro d'italia as a mark of that date 8.6 kilometers of a time trial through the city center and along the banks of the river po an opportunity for the specialist to get up to warp speed and early time check at three point eight k's in but at the finish line it was matthias friendly who set the fastest time austrian champion in the hot seat early on he wouldn't stay there all day though alexander vlassov making his jidor proper debut given that he only lasted a day and a half a year ago would finish very very high up as far as the rest of the gc contenders were concerned one man to watch over the next three weeks will be to bs foss the former winner of the under-23 edition of the tour de france the tour de avenir he'd move into the hot seat and jumbo visma would start a very very good day remy cavania had hoped to end the day in the pink jersey a week after winning a time trial in switzerland but he'd disappoint and it would be another of the jumbo vismaradas who would dislodge his teammate foss dethroned by eduardo afini a young italian time trialist in his first year with the team after having spent the first couple of years of his career with the australian outfit bike exchange everybody remembered that joao almeida spent 15 days in the pink jersey last year and he wouldn't be far off at this year just 7.3 seconds down as making his jiro debut again bernal would be looking to put in a satisfactory performance it would prove to be just that an okay start for the former tour de france winner simon yates will put in a similar time vincenzo nibili had been out as well and performed admirably had everybody been waiting for renko have nepal to make his grand tour debut it came a year later than we'd expected because of a crash and an injury in 2020 and he'd be up a minute before felipe gana gana having won all three time trials in the 2020 judo poor old affini was watching two fast men gunning for him even nepal wouldn't manage to knock afini off his perch but it'd be a really good start from the 21 year old belgian sixth at that point he'd later be bumped down a place with felipe ghana going supersonic demolishing the competition and coming in 10 seconds quicker than afini the city famous for the shroud of turin turning it pink on this day and everybody taking their hat off to philippe organa who'd be wearing it at the end of the day so ghana having a fifth stage winning eight months of giro d'italia racing the gyro back in may ghana back on top winning stage one and pulling on the pink jersey a home rider from the region of piamonte a very special moment for the local supporters ghana on the podium in pink and he'd lead the general classification going into stage two with a 10 second gap good starts too for the likes of nepal and almeida stage two should be one for the sprinters two stars out of five is the rating given by the organizers we go through monte carlo dasty for the first king of the mountains clash of this child italia then two intermediate sprints at tricero and vercelli before a finish in novada after 179 kilometers the likes of yuan segan gaviria and the rest will battle it out in the sprints day one though belonged yet again to the ineos grenadiers who picked up where they left off at the judo winning and with the pink jersey
